title: 1920s
content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:The Walt Disney Company.svg|right|thumb|[[The Walt Disney Company]] was founded in 1923]]

A list of events in the '''1920s''' related to ''Star Wars''.

==Births==

*[[June 1]] – [[Alethea McGrath]].
*[[September 4]] – [[Craig Claiborne]].

==Events==
===1923===
*[[Warner Bros.]] is founded on [[April 4]], 1923.
*[[The Walt Disney Company]] is founded on [[October 16]], 1923.
*[[Hasbro Inc.]] is founded on [[December 6]], 1923.

===1927===
*[[Random House]] is founded.
